text:
The good news about the Apple Developer renewal is that I'll be able to sign
- The OpenXR OSX compagnon
- Simulators / Players
- The OpenXR Runtime/Server itself (which is x64/arm64 for maximum compatibility)
And.... I'll be able to sign also Open Dark Basic and few games...
